description: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49 path normalization flaw. FahScan only reports a passive local match and does not validate exploitability.
recommendation: Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to a fixed release and confirm the exposed version.

description: Redis package vulnerability in specific Linux distributions. FahScan reports only a passive service-name match.
recommendation: Review distribution package advisories and upgrade Redis packages.

description: Apache Log4j remote code execution vulnerability. FahScan only reports passive metadata matches.
recommendation: Inventory Java applications and upgrade Log4j to a fixed version.
